chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-2866 of 2025 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 1 to 5. 2. For hearing of main case. 19.08.2025 Mr. Asadullah H. Memon, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Safdar Depar. Ms. Rubina Qadir, DPG along with Inspector / IO Jahangir, P.S Shahrah-e-Faisal, Karachi. ------------- This petition pertains to quashment of the FIR No.455/2025, under Section 489-F registered at Police Station Shahrah-e-Faisal, Karachi. Investigating Officer is present in Court and states that challan has already been submitted in respect of the aforesaid FIR before the concerned trial Court. The petitioner has an alternate remedy to approach the concerned trial Court to redress his grievance. This being a case, the instant petition is dismissed as not maintainable under constitutional jurisdiction of this Court. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
